blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 30 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
